clear_the_road.title: Clear the Road
clear_the_road.description: Wolves have been attacking travelers on the road to the Darkwood. The garrison sergeant wants them dealt with.

objectives.description: Kill wolves on the Darkwood Road

goblin_menace.title: The Goblin Menace
goblin_menace.description: Goblins from the Darkwood have been raiding the market stalls at night. Find their hollow and put an end to it.

into_the_ruins.title: Into the Ruins
into_the_ruins.description: A scholar believes the ruins hold ancient texts. Enter the dungeon and find the archive.

slay_the_lich.title: Slay the Lich
slay_the_lich.description: The source of the undead plague. A lich commands them from deep within the ruins. End it.

slay_the_dragon.title: Dragon Slayer
slay_the_dragon.description: The ancient dragon at the heart of the dungeon is the true source of the corruption. Defeat it to save Ironhaven.
